admissible_metric.note: Theorem objecthood claims are stated only in the TV/Dobrushin metric family.

admissible_regime.regime_note: Epsilon-stability and separation are measured in the same theorem metric.

proxy_metric_artifact.note: Support-signature clustering is a proxy artifact and not theorem evidence.

contextual_noncontractive_case.note: This case is outside the admissible contraction regime and is contextual rather than contradictory.

resolution_note: Earlier objecthood metric/regime gap is resolved by freezing admissible theorem metric/regime to total variation + lambda<1 contraction and excluding proxy clustering metrics from theorem evidence.
